prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约1080名，2023年约1083名，2024年升至约954名（近年最佳），2025年回落至约1068名。近四年位次在954-1083之间窄幅波动，2025年基准约10 68名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2022-2024年均为61人，2025年增至66人，2026年计划56人，较2025年缩招约15%，竞争压力有所加大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第39-40名（2026年），属于国内中上层次理工类高校，信息与通信、电子科学等学科实力突出；2022年曾因学术不端事件获偏负面评价，2025年有校园霸凌相关舆情；抖音热度排名第60位（较热），综合热度约53万，整体关注度中等偏上，未见明显断档或投档异常记录。 第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A、机械工程A-，共5个A-及以上学科，与该校电子信息类、计 算机类等招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度指数76.86（高热推荐），计算机类67.8（推荐），相关专业社会热度持续高位；宁夏2026 年总考生约6.6万人（不确定），物理类按近年占比约66%估算约4.36万人，较2025年物理类4.45万人略降，竞争略有缓和；该校 位于陕西西安，与宁夏为邻省，交通便利，对宁夏考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1068名、2026年招生计划 缩招约15%（使位次前移）、学校声誉偏负面（抑制报考热度）、电子信息类专业持续高热（吸引考生）以及考生总数略降等因素，缩招效应占主导但受声誉负面部分抵消。预测2 026年最低位次约986名，区间838-1134名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（通信）
- 电子信息类（集成电路）
- 计算机类（大类含软件工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子工程）
- 计算机类（网络安全）
- 电子信息类（电子科学、信息物理、空天信息）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）
- 管理科学与工程类（数字化与商务智能融合培养）
- 生物医学工程类（电子信息交叉融合班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（838-1134名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如838名以内）可重点冲击一档的电子信息类（通信/ 集成电路）王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（1134名附近）应以三档专业保底为主。该校电子信息类和计算机类为传统强势方向，学科评估A+/A，就业前景广阔，建议优先考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2022 was approximately 1080, in 2023 approximately 1083, in 2024 it rose to approximately 954 (best in recent years), and in 2025 it fell back to approximately 1068. Over the past four years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly between 954 and 1083, with a baseline of approximately 1068 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Ningxia: 61 students each year from 2022 to 2024, increased to 66 in 2025, and planned 56 students in 2026, a reduction of about 15% compared to 2025, increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 39-40th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), belonging to the upper-middle level of domestic science and engineering universities, with outstanding strengths in information and communication, electronic science, etc. In 2022, it received negative evaluations due to academic misconduct incidents, and in 2025, there was campus bullying-related public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking 60th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 530,000, overall attention moderately high, no obvious gaps or abnormal admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, Mechanical Engineering A-, a total of 5 disciplines rated A- or above, highly matching the university's enrollment majors in electronic information and computer science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic information/communication majors had a popularity index of 76.86 in 2024 (highly recommended), computer science 67.8 (recommended), with related majors maintaining high social popularity. In 2026, Ningxia's total examinees are about 66,000 (uncertain), with physics category estimated at about 43,600 based on recent proportion of about 66%, slightly lower than 44,500 in 2025, easing competition slightly. The university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a neighboring province to Ningxia, with convenient transportation, offering some regional appeal to Ningxia examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 1068 in 2025, the enrollment plan reduction of about 15% in 2026 (moving ranking forward), negative university reputation (suppressing application enthusiasm), sustained high popularity of electronic information majors (attracting students), and a slight decrease in total examinees, the reduction effect dominates but is partially offset by negative reputation. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 986, with a range of 838-1134.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electronic Information (Communication)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits)
- Computer Science (General, including Software Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering)
- Computer Science (Cybersecurity)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digital and Business Intelligence Integration)
- Biomedical Engineering (Electronic Information Cross-Fusion Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (838-1134), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 838), focus on Tier 1 flagship majors like Electronic Information (Communication/Integrated Circuits). If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 1134), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety. The university's electronic information and computer science majors are traditionally strong, with discipline evaluations of A+/A, offering broad employment prospects, so priority is recommended.
